name: Broccoli & Potatoes w/ Dill
recipeIngredient: 2 medium red potatoes, cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Place potatoes in a pot of boiling water with the dill sprigs. Cook for about 5 minutes, or until tender.
2. Add broccoli to the pot and cook for another 5 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
3. Drain the potatoes and broccoli well.
4. In a large bowl, add the potatoes, broccoli, scallions, lemon juice, olive oil, and black pepper. Toss well to combine.
5. Serve warm as a side dish, or chill for about 1 hour and serve as a salad.
